main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling DBNPA reducido + umbral ATP permisivo' literal.

key_signals.justification: Conecta ATP×4 + ΔP1 + ΔP3 estable + CIP ácido rebote 12d + TOC↑.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (NOM, Mn/Fe FOUL, SCAL, OXID KMnO4) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: DBNPA shock 20 mg/L cada 3d + CIP alcalino NaOH+EDTA+SDS + ácido cítrico.

requested_data.justification: Pide HPC/ATP en membrana frontal — match exacto accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: ATP membrana <1000 OR autopsia inorgánico → switch.
